authors.author: Chris Bowater
Chris Bowater
Herrsche du, höchster Herr, herrsche du

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Over all the earth you reign on high Every mountain stream, every sunset sky But my one request, Lord my only aim Is that you'd reign in me again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord reign in me, reign in your power Over all my dreams, in my darkest hour You are the Lord of all I am So won't you reign in me again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Over every thought, over every word May my life reflect the beauty of my Lord Cause you mean more to me than any earthly thing So won't you reign in me again
